
FUNCTION Main_copy GLOBAL
    CALL Declarations
    CALL 'File Cleanup'
    CALL 'Get Report'
    Excel.LaunchExcel.LaunchAndOpenUnderExistingProcess Path: $'''C:\\Users\\%User%\\OneDrive - Infinity HCM\\Downloads\\Automate Downloads\\poc_documentation_compliance_report_IHCM.xls''' Visible: True ReadOnly: False UseMachineLocale: False Instance=> ExcelInstance
    Excel.ReadFromExcel.ReadAllCells Instance: ExcelInstance GetCellContentsMode: Excel.GetCellContentsMode.PlainText FirstLineIsHeader: False RangeValue=> ExcelData
    Excel.CloseExcel.Close Instance: ExcelInstance
    SET DateRange TO $'''%ExcelData[0][1]% - %ExcelData[0][13]%'''
    CALL Analysis
    File.ReadTextFromFile.ReadText File: $'''C:\\Users\\%User%\\OneDrive - Infinity HCM\\Automation\\POC Compliance\\Email Body - Illinois.txt''' Encoding: File.TextFileEncoding.DefaultEncoding Content=> EmailBodyIllinois
    File.ReadTextFromFile.ReadText File: $'''C:\\Users\\%User%\\OneDrive - Infinity HCM\\Automation\\POC Compliance\\Email Body - Indiana.txt''' Encoding: File.TextFileEncoding.DefaultEncoding Content=> EmailBodyIndiana
    File.ReadTextFromFile.ReadText File: $'''C:\\Users\\%User%\\OneDrive - Infinity HCM\\Automation\\POC Compliance\\Email Body - Tennessee.txt''' Encoding: File.TextFileEncoding.DefaultEncoding Content=> EmailBodyTennessee
    CALL 'File Cleanup'
    WebAutomation.CloseWebBrowser BrowserInstance: Browser
END FUNCTION


FUNCTION Declarations GLOBAL
    # Enviornment variables
    System.GetEnvironmentVariable.GetEnvironmentVariable Name: $'''USERNAME''' Value=> User
    System.GetEnvironmentVariable.GetEnvironmentVariable Name: $'''COMPUTERNAME''' Value=> Computer
    # Runtime timestamp
    DateTime.GetCurrentDateTime.Local DateTimeFormat: DateTime.DateTimeFormat.DateAndTime CurrentDateTime=> ScriptStartTime
    DateTime.GetCurrentDateTime.Local DateTimeFormat: DateTime.DateTimeFormat.DateAndTime CurrentDateTime=> CurrentDateTime
    DateTime.Add DateTime: CurrentDateTime TimeToAdd: -3 TimeUnit: DateTime.TimeUnit.Days ResultedDate=> ResultedDate
    SET NewVar TO $'''%ResultedDate.Month%/%ResultedDate.Day%/%ResultedDate.Year%'''
    # Previously save reports
    DISABLE Folder.GetFiles Folder: $'''C:\\Users\\%User%\\OneDrive - Infinity HCM\\Downloads\\Automate Downloads''' FileFilter: $'''poc_documentation_compliance_report.*''' IncludeSubfolders: False FailOnAccessDenied: True SortBy1: Folder.SortBy.NoSort SortDescending1: False SortBy2: Folder.SortBy.NoSort SortDescending2: False SortBy3: Folder.SortBy.NoSort SortDescending3: False Files=> Files
    DISABLE File.Delete Files: Files
    # Get FacMaster data
    DISABLE IF (File.IfFile.DoesNotExist File: $'''C:\\Users\\%User%\\OneDrive - Infinity HCM\\Automation\\POC Compliance\\FacMaster.csv''') THEN
        SET SPFilterQuery TO $'''field_1 eq \'Yes\' and field_2 eq \'Yes\' and FacilityType eq \'SNF\''''
        @@dataset: 'Infinity Unite Platform - https://ihcm.sharepoint.com'
@@table: 'Facility Master'
@@folderPath: ''
@@viewScopeOption: ''
@@view: ''
@@'OutputSchema:GetItemsResponse': '-1217902331'
@@connectionDisplayName: 'Crd875b_shared_sharepointonline_d245884f'
External.InvokeCloudConnector Connection: '2d6a4a9f-b6b8-4ca8-86ab-6bdb77c69cd7' ConnectorId: '/providers/Microsoft.PowerApps/apis/shared_sharepointonline' OperationId: 'GetItems' @dataset: $'''https://ihcm.sharepoint.com''' @table: $'''0ebcfab3-8ec5-45e3-a2f6-da50bf21c28f''' @'$filter': SPFilterQuery @'$orderby': $'''Title''' @GetItemsResponse=> FacMaster
        Variables.CreateNewDatatable InputTable: { ^['Proper', 'PCC', 'State'], [$'''''', $'''''', $''''''] } DataTable=> FacMasterTable
        LOOP FOREACH CurrentFacMasterLine IN FacMaster.value
            Variables.AddRowToDataTable.AppendRowToDataTable DataTable: FacMasterTable RowToAdd: [CurrentFacMasterLine.Title, CurrentFacMasterLine.field_13, CurrentFacMasterLine.field_6]
        END
        DISABLE File.WriteToCSVFile.WriteCSV VariableToWrite: FacMasterTable CSVFile: $'''C:\\Users\\%User%\\OneDrive - Infinity HCM\\Automation\\POC Compliance\\FacMaster.csv''' CsvFileEncoding: File.CSVEncoding.SystemDefault IncludeColumnNames: True IfFileExists: File.IfFileExists.Overwrite ColumnsSeparator: File.CSVColumnsSeparator.Tab
    DISABLE ELSE
        DISABLE File.ReadFromCSVFile.ReadCSV CSVFile: $'''C:\\Users\\%User%\\OneDrive - Infinity HCM\\Automation\\POC Compliance\\FacMaster.csv''' Encoding: File.CSVEncoding.SystemDefault TrimFields: True FirstLineContainsColumnNames: True ColumnsSeparator: File.CSVColumnsSeparator.Tab CSVTable=> FacMasterTable
    DISABLE END
END FUNCTION

      "IsDisabled": false,
      "LogicalName": "Crd875b_shared_sharepointonline_d245884f6a1d4fb7a573b7d71d08e584",
      "IsEmbedded": false,
      "ConnectionName": "shared-sharepointonl-b6b3956c-4452-45e1-adf7-6669a1145d24",
      "ConnectionDisplayName": "power@infinityhcm.com"
    }
  ]
}

FUNCTION 'PCC Login' GLOBAL
    LABEL StartLoginProcess
    SET PWD TO $'''ReportDouble5!'''
    IF Computer = $'''411100-PCK39''' THEN
        IF (UIAutomation.IfWindow.IsOpenByTitleClass Title: $'''*Mozilla Firefox''' Class: $'''''') THEN
            WebAutomation.LaunchFirefox.AttachToFirefoxByUrl TabUrl: $'''pointclickcare.com''' AttachTimeout: 5 CommunicationMode: WebAutomation.BrowserCommunicationMethod.Extension TargetDesktop: $'''{\"DisplayName\":\"Local computer\",\"Route\":{\"ServerType\":\"Local\",\"ServerAddress\":\"\"},\"DesktopType\":\"local\"}''' BrowserInstance=> Browser
        ELSE
            WebAutomation.LaunchFirefox.LaunchFirefox Url: $'''login.pointclickcare.com''' WindowState: WebAutomation.BrowserWindowState.Normal ClearCache: False ClearCookies: False WaitForPageToLoadTimeout: 60 Timeout: 60 PiPUserDataFolderMode: WebAutomation.PiPUserDataFolderModeEnum.AutomaticProfile TargetDesktop: $'''{\"DisplayName\":\"Local computer\",\"Route\":{\"ServerType\":\"Local\",\"ServerAddress\":\"\"},\"DesktopType\":\"local\"}''' BrowserInstance=> Browser
            WebAutomation.PopulateTextField.PopulateTextFieldUsePhysicalKeyboard BrowserInstance: Browser Control: appmask['Web Page \'h ... ogin.xhtml\'']['Input text \'un\' 2'] Text: $'''%CurrentDatabase%.InfinityInsight''' Mode: WebAutomation.PopulateTextMode.Replace UnfocusAfterPopulate: True WaitForPageToLoadTimeout: 60
            WebAutomation.PressButton.PressButton BrowserInstance: Browser Control: appmask['Web Page \'h ... ogin.xhtml\'']['Button \'Next\''] WaitForPageToLoadTimeout: 60
            WAIT (WebAutomation.WaitForWebPageContent.WebPageToContainElement BrowserInstance: Browser Control: appmask['Web Page \'h ... 9hZ2U9MzAw\'']['Input password'])
            WebAutomation.PopulateTextField.PopulateTextField BrowserInstance: Browser Control: appmask['Web Page \'h ... 9hZ2U9MzAw\' 2']['Input password 3'] Text: PWD Mode: WebAutomation.PopulateTextMode.Replace EmulateTyping: True UnfocusAfterPopulate: True WaitForPageToLoadTimeout: 60
            WebAutomation.PressButton.PressButton BrowserInstance: Browser Control: appmask['Web Page \'h ... 9hZ2U9MzAw\'']['Button \'Sign in\' 2'] WaitForPageToLoadTimeout: 60
            WAIT (WebAutomation.WaitForWebPageContent.WebPageToNotContainElement BrowserInstance: Browser Control: appmask['Web Page \'h ... 9hZ2U9MzAw\'']['Button \'Sign in\' 2']) 
            ON ERROR
                CALL 'Close Firefox'
            END
            IF FireFoxTerm = $'''true''' THEN
                SET FireFoxTerm TO $'''false'''
                GOTO StartLoginProcess
            END
            LOOP WHILE (WebPageTitle) <> ($'''Home''')
                WebAutomation.GetDetailsOfWebPage BrowserInstance: Browser DetailsType: WebAutomation.DetailsType.Title Details=> WebPageTitle
                IF Contains(WebPageTitle, $'''Multi-Factor Setup''', False) THEN
                    WebAutomation.PressButton.PressButton BrowserInstance: Browser Control: appmask['Web Page \'h ... 9hZ2U9MzAw\' 3']['Span \'CONTINUE\''] WaitForPageToLoadTimeout: 60
                    EXIT LOOP
                END
                WAIT 2
            END
            WAIT (WebAutomation.WaitForWebPageContent.WebPageToContainElement BrowserInstance: Browser Control: appmask['Web Page \'h ... newlogin=Y\'']['Input button \'Search\''])
        END
    ELSE
        IF CurrentDatabase = $'''IHCM''' THEN
            WebAutomation.LaunchFirefox.LaunchFirefox Url: $'''login.pointclickcare.com''' WindowState: WebAutomation.BrowserWindowState.Normal ClearCache: False ClearCookies: False WaitForPageToLoadTimeout: 60 Timeout: 60 PiPUserDataFolderMode: WebAutomation.PiPUserDataFolderModeEnum.AutomaticProfile TargetDesktop: $'''{\"DisplayName\":\"Local computer\",\"Route\":{\"ServerType\":\"Local\",\"ServerAddress\":\"\"},\"DesktopType\":\"local\"}''' BrowserInstance=> Browser
        DISABLE ELSE
            DISABLE WebAutomation.LaunchFirefox.LaunchFirefox Url: $'''login.pointclickcare.com''' WindowState: WebAutomation.BrowserWindowState.Normal ClearCache: False ClearCookies: False WaitForPageToLoadTimeout: 60 Timeout: 60 PiPUserDataFolderMode: WebAutomation.PiPUserDataFolderModeEnum.AutomaticProfile TargetDesktop: $'''{\"DisplayName\":\"Local computer\",\"Route\":{\"ServerType\":\"Local\",\"ServerAddress\":\"\"},\"DesktopType\":\"local\"}''' BrowserInstance=> Browser
        END
        UIAutomation.SetWindowState.SetStateByInstanceOrHandle WindowInstance: Browser State: UIAutomation.WindowState.Maximized
        WebAutomation.PopulateTextField.PopulateTextFieldUsePhysicalKeyboard BrowserInstance: Browser Control: appmask['Web Page \'h ... ogin.xhtml\'']['Input text \'un\' 2'] Text: $'''%CurrentDatabase%.InfinityInsight''' Mode: WebAutomation.PopulateTextMode.Replace UnfocusAfterPopulate: True WaitForPageToLoadTimeout: 60
        WebAutomation.PressButton.PressButton BrowserInstance: Browser Control: appmask['Web Page \'h ... ogin.xhtml\'']['Button \'Next\''] WaitForPageToLoadTimeout: 60
        WAIT (WebAutomation.WaitForWebPageContent.WebPageToContainElement BrowserInstance: Browser Control: appmask['Web Page \'h ... 9hZ2U9MzAw\'']['Input password']) FOR 10 
        ON ERROR
            GOTO StartLoginProcess
        END
        WebAutomation.PopulateTextField.PopulateTextField BrowserInstance: Browser Control: appmask['Web Page \'h ... 9hZ2U9MzAw\' 2']['Input password 3'] Text: PWD Mode: WebAutomation.PopulateTextMode.Replace EmulateTyping: True UnfocusAfterPopulate: True WaitForPageToLoadTimeout: 60
        WebAutomation.PressButton.PressButton BrowserInstance: Browser Control: appmask['Web Page \'h ... 9hZ2U9MzAw\'']['Button \'Sign in\' 2'] WaitForPageToLoadTimeout: 60
        WAIT (WebAutomation.WaitForWebPageContent.WebPageToNotContainElement BrowserInstance: Browser Control: appmask['Web Page \'h ... 9hZ2U9MzAw\'']['Button \'Sign in\' 2'])
        LOOP WHILE (WebPageTitle) <> ($'''Home''')
            WebAutomation.GetDetailsOfWebPage BrowserInstance: Browser DetailsType: WebAutomation.DetailsType.Title Details=> WebPageTitle
            IF Contains(WebPageTitle, $'''Multi-Factor Setup''', False) THEN
                WebAutomation.PressButton.PressButton BrowserInstance: Browser Control: appmask['Web Page \'h ... 9hZ2U9MzAw\' 3']['Span \'CONTINUE\''] WaitForPageToLoadTimeout: 60
                WAIT 2
            END
        END
        WAIT (WebAutomation.WaitForWebPageContent.WebPageToContainElement BrowserInstance: Browser Control: appmask['Web Page \'h ... newlogin=Y\'']['Input button \'Search\''])
    END
    DISABLE SET PWD TO $'''ReportDouble5!'''
    DISABLE LABEL Login
    DISABLE WebAutomation.LaunchFirefox.LaunchFirefox Url: $'''login.pointclickcare.com''' WindowState: WebAutomation.BrowserWindowState.Normal ClearCache: False ClearCookies: False WaitForPageToLoadTimeout: 60 Timeout: 60 PiPUserDataFolderMode: WebAutomation.PiPUserDataFolderModeEnum.AutomaticProfile TargetDesktop: $'''{\"DisplayName\":\"Local computer\",\"Route\":{\"ServerType\":\"Local\",\"ServerAddress\":\"\"},\"DesktopType\":\"local\"}''' BrowserInstance=> Browser
    DISABLE WebAutomation.PopulateTextField.PopulateTextFieldUsePhysicalKeyboard BrowserInstance: Browser Control: appmask['Web Page \'h ... ogin.xhtml\'']['Input text \'un\''] Text: $'''%CurrentDatabase%.InfinityInsight''' Mode: WebAutomation.PopulateTextMode.Replace UnfocusAfterPopulate: True WaitForPageToLoadTimeout: 60
    DISABLE WebAutomation.PressButton.PressButton BrowserInstance: Browser Control: appmask['Web Page \'h ... ogin.xhtml\'']['Button \'Next\''] WaitForPageToLoadTimeout: 60
    DISABLE WAIT (WebAutomation.WaitForWebPageContent.WebPageToContainElement BrowserInstance: Browser Control: appmask['Web Page \'h ... 9hZ2U9MzAw\'']['Input password'])
    DISABLE WebAutomation.PopulateTextField.PopulateTextField BrowserInstance: Browser Control: appmask['Web Page \'h ... MwMA%3D%3D\'']['Input password'] Text: PWD Mode: WebAutomation.PopulateTextMode.Replace EmulateTyping: True UnfocusAfterPopulate: True WaitForPageToLoadTimeout: 60
    DISABLE WebAutomation.PressButton.PressButton BrowserInstance: Browser Control: appmask['Web Page \'h ... 9hZ2U9MzAw\'']['Button \'Sign in\''] WaitForPageToLoadTimeout: 60
    DISABLE WAIT (WebAutomation.WaitForWebPageContent.WebPageToNotContainElement BrowserInstance: Browser Control: appmask['Web Page \'h ... 9hZ2U9MzAw\'']['Button \'Sign in\''])
    DISABLE LOOP WHILE (WebPageTitle) <> ($'''Home''')
        DISABLE WebAutomation.GetDetailsOfWebPage BrowserInstance: Browser DetailsType: WebAutomation.DetailsType.Title Details=> WebPageTitle
        DISABLE IF Contains(WebPageTitle, $'''Multi-Factor Setup''', False) THEN
            DISABLE WebAutomation.PressButton.PressButton BrowserInstance: Browser Control: appmask['Web Page \'h ... 9hZ2U9MzAw\' 3']['Span \'CONTINUE\''] WaitForPageToLoadTimeout: 60
        DISABLE END
        DISABLE WAIT 2
    DISABLE END
    DISABLE WAIT (WebAutomation.WaitForWebPageContent.WebPageToContainElement BrowserInstance: Browser Control: appmask['Web Page \'h ... newlogin=Y\'']['Input button \'Search\''])
    DISABLE WebAutomation.GoToWebPage.GoToWebPage BrowserInstance: Browser Url: $'''https://login.pointclickcare.com/home/userLogin.xhtml''' WaitForPageToLoadTimeout: 60
    DISABLE WebAutomation.PopulateTextField.PopulateTextFieldUsePhysicalKeyboard BrowserInstance: Browser Control: appmask['Web Page \'h ... ogin.xhtml\'']['Input text \'un\''] Text: $'''%CurrentDatabase%.InfinityInsight''' Mode: WebAutomation.PopulateTextMode.Replace UnfocusAfterPopulate: True WaitForPageToLoadTimeout: 60
    DISABLE WebAutomation.PressButton.PressButton BrowserInstance: Browser Control: appmask['Web Page \'h ... ogin.xhtml\'']['Button \'Next\''] WaitForPageToLoadTimeout: 60
    DISABLE WAIT (WebAutomation.WaitForWebPageContent.WebPageToContainElement BrowserInstance: Browser Control: appmask['Web Page \'h ... MwMA%3D%3D\'']['Input password'])
    DISABLE WebAutomation.PopulateTextField.PopulateTextFieldUsePhysicalKeyboard BrowserInstance: Browser Control: appmask['Web Page \'h ... 9hZ2U9MzAw\' 2']['Input password'] Text: PWD Mode: WebAutomation.PopulateTextMode.Replace UnfocusAfterPopulate: True WaitForPageToLoadTimeout: 60
    DISABLE WebAutomation.PressButton.PressButton BrowserInstance: Browser Control: appmask['Web Page \'h ... MwMA%3D%3D\'']['Button \'Sign in\''] WaitForPageToLoadTimeout: 60
    DISABLE WebAutomation.GetDetailsOfWebPage BrowserInstance: Browser DetailsType: WebAutomation.DetailsType.Title Details=> WebPageTitle
    DISABLE IF Contains(WebPageTitle, $'''Multi-Factor Setup''', False) THEN
        DISABLE WebAutomation.PressButton.PressButton BrowserInstance: Browser Control: appmask['Web Page \'h ... 9hZ2U9MzAw\'']['Button \'CONTINUE\''] WaitForPageToLoadTimeout: 60
    DISABLE END
    DISABLE IF (WebAutomation.IfWebPageContains.WebPageContainsElement BrowserInstance: Browser Control: appmask['Web Page \'h ... 9hZ2U9MzAw\'']['Span \'WarningAction Required\'']) THEN
        DISABLE WebAutomation.PressButton.PressButton BrowserInstance: Browser Control: appmask['Web Page \'h ... 9hZ2U9MzAw\'']['Button \'CONTINUE\''] WaitForPageToLoadTimeout: 60
    DISABLE END
    DISABLE WAIT (WebAutomation.WaitForWebPageContent.WebPageToContainElement BrowserInstance: Browser Control: appmask['Web Page \'h ... newlogin=Y\'']['Input text \'substring\'']) FOR 20 
ON ERROR
    CALL 'Close Firefox'
END
END FUNCTION

FUNCTION 'Close Firefox' GLOBAL
    SET FireFoxTerm TO $'''true'''
    System.TerminateProcess.TerminateProcessByName ProcessName: $'''firefox'''
    WAIT (System.WaitForProcess.ProcessToStop ProcessName: $'''firefox''')

            **REGION Wait for Download
            Variables.CreateNewList List=> DownloadList
            LOOP WHILE (DownloadList.Count) < (1)
                Variables.ClearList List: DownloadList
                Folder.GetFiles Folder: $'''C:\\Users\\%User%\\OneDrive - Infinity HCM\\Downloads\\Automate Downloads''' FileFilter: $'''poc_documentation_compliance_report.*''' IncludeSubfolders: False FailOnAccessDenied: True SortBy1: Folder.SortBy.NoSort SortDescending1: False SortBy2: Folder.SortBy.NoSort SortDescending2: False SortBy3: Folder.SortBy.NoSort SortDescending3: False Files=> Files

                    WAIT 20
                END
            END
            **ENDREGION
        END
        WebAutomation.GoToWebPage.GoToWebPage BrowserInstance: Browser Url: $'''https://www30.pointclickcare.com/home/logout.jsp''' WaitForPageToLoadTimeout: 60
    END
    DISABLE WebAutomation.CloseWebBrowser BrowserInstance: Browser
END FUNCTION

FUNCTION 'Get Report' GLOBAL
    WebAutomation.LaunchFirefox.LaunchFirefox Url: $'''login.pointclickcare.com''' WindowState: WebAutomation.BrowserWindowState.Normal ClearCache: False ClearCookies: False WaitForPageToLoadTimeout: 60 Timeout: 60 PiPUserDataFolderMode: WebAutomation.PiPUserDataFolderModeEnum.AutomaticProfile TargetDesktop: $'''{\"DisplayName\":\"Local computer\",\"Route\":{\"ServerType\":\"Local\",\"ServerAddress\":\"\"},\"DesktopType\":\"local\"}''' BrowserInstance=> Browser
    UIAutomation.SetWindowState.SetStateByInstanceOrHandle WindowInstance: Browser State: UIAutomation.WindowState.Maximized
    Variables.CreateNewDatatable InputTable: { ^['Database'], [$'''IHCM'''], [$'''BMHCC'''] } DataTable=> PCCDBs
    LOOP FOREACH CurrentDatabase IN PCCDBs
        IF (File.IfFile.DoesNotExist File: $'''C:\\Users\\%User%\\OneDrive - Infinity HCM\\Downloads\\Automate Downloads\\poc_documentation_compliance_report_%CurrentDatabase%.xls''') THEN
            CALL 'PCC Login'
            WebAutomation.GoToWebPage.GoToWebPage BrowserInstance: Browser Url: $'''https://www30.pointclickcare.com/reporting/setup/runtime/clinicalreports.xhtml?action=setupReport&report_id=-1005&ESOLaction=run&ESOLreportCatalogId=-51''' WaitForPageToLoadTimeout: 60
            DISABLE WebAutomation.Click.Click BrowserInstance: Browser Control: appmask['Web Page \'h ... alogId=-51\'']['Anchor \'all\''] ClickType: WebAutomation.ClickType.LeftClick MouseClick: True WaitForPageToLoadTimeout: 60 MousePositionRelativeToElement: WebAutomation.RectangleEdgePoint.MiddleCenter OffsetX: 0 OffsetY: 0
            LABEL 'Select Fac'
            WebAutomation.Click.Click BrowserInstance: Browser Control: appmask['Web Page \'h ... alogId=-51\'']['Fac Selection'] ClickType: WebAutomation.ClickType.LeftClick MouseClick: True WaitForPageToLoadTimeout: 60 MousePositionRelativeToElement: WebAutomation.RectangleEdgePoint.MiddleCenter OffsetX: 0 OffsetY: 0
            WebAutomation.LaunchFirefox.AttachToFirefoxByTitle TabTitle: $'''Facility Scope Filter''' AttachTimeout: 5 CommunicationMode: WebAutomation.BrowserCommunicationMethod.Extension TargetDesktop: $'''{\"DisplayName\":\"Local computer\",\"Route\":{\"ServerType\":\"Local\",\"ServerAddress\":\"\"},\"DesktopType\":\"local\"}''' BrowserInstance=> Browser2
            ON ERROR
                GOTO 'Select Fac'
            END
            UIAutomation.SetWindowState.SetStateByInstanceOrHandle WindowInstance: Browser2 State: UIAutomation.WindowState.Maximized
            IF CurrentDatabase = $'''IHCM''' THEN
                WebAutomation.PressButton.PressButton BrowserInstance: Browser2 Control: appmask['Web Page \'h ... roup_Name=\'']['Fac Selection By'] WaitForPageToLoadTimeout: 60
                WebAutomation.SetCheckboxState.SetCheckboxState BrowserInstance: Browser2 Control: appmask['Web Page \'h ... filter.jsp\'']['CB Illinois'] State: WebAutomation.CheckboxState.Checked WaitForPageToLoadTimeout: 60
                WebAutomation.SetCheckboxState.SetCheckboxState BrowserInstance: Browser2 Control: appmask['Web Page \'h ... filter.jsp\'']['CB Indiana'] State: WebAutomation.CheckboxState.Checked WaitForPageToLoadTimeout: 60
                WebAutomation.SetCheckboxState.SetCheckboxState BrowserInstance: Browser2 Control: appmask['Web Page \'h ... filter.jsp\'']['CB Tennessee'] State: WebAutomation.CheckboxState.Checked WaitForPageToLoadTimeout: 60
            ELSE
                WebAutomation.SetCheckboxState.SetCheckboxState BrowserInstance: Browser2 Control: appmask['Web Page \'h ... roup_Name=\' 2']['Input checkbox \'ESOLfacid\''] State: WebAutomation.CheckboxState.Checked WaitForPageToLoadTimeout: 60
            END
            WebAutomation.PressButton.PressButton BrowserInstance: Browser2 Control: appmask['Web Page \'h ... filter.jsp\'']['Save Button'] WaitForPageToLoadTimeout: 60
            WebAutomation.SelectRadioButton.SelectRadioButton BrowserInstance: Browser Control: appmask['Web Page \'h ... alogId=-51\'']['Input radio \'ESOLfiltervalue_1\''] WaitForPageToLoadTimeout: 60
            WebAutomation.PopulateTextField.PopulateTextField BrowserInstance: Browser Control: appmask['Web Page \'h ... alogId=-51\'']['Period Ending'] Text: $'''%ResultedDate.Month%/%ResultedDate.Day%/%ResultedDate.Year%''' Mode: WebAutomation.PopulateTextMode.Replace EmulateTyping: True UnfocusAfterPopulate: True WaitForPageToLoadTimeout: 60
            WebAutomation.SetDropDownListValue.SetDropDownListValueByName BrowserInstance: Browser Control: appmask['Web Page \'h ... alogId=-51\'']['Period Length'] OptionNames: 7 UseRegularExpression: False WaitForPageToLoadTimeout: 60
            WebAutomation.SetDropDownListValue.SetDropDownListValueByName BrowserInstance: Browser Control: appmask['Web Page \'h ... alogId=-51\'']['Report Format'] OptionNames: $'''Excel''' UseRegularExpression: False WaitForPageToLoadTimeout: 60
            LABEL 'Run Report'
            WebAutomation.PressButton.PressButton BrowserInstance: Browser Control: appmask['Web Page \'h ... alogId=-51\'']['Run Report'] WaitForPageToLoadTimeout: 60
            **REGION Wait for Download
            Variables.CreateNewList List=> DownloadList
            LOOP WHILE (DownloadList.Count) < (1)
                Variables.ClearList List: DownloadList
                Folder.GetFiles Folder: $'''C:\\Users\\%User%\\OneDrive - Infinity HCM\\Downloads\\Automate Downloads''' FileFilter: $'''poc_documentation_compliance_report.*''' IncludeSubfolders: False FailOnAccessDenied: True SortBy1: Folder.SortBy.NoSort SortDescending1: False SortBy2: Folder.SortBy.NoSort SortDescending2: False SortBy3: Folder.SortBy.NoSort SortDescending3: False Files=> Files
                IF Files.Count = 1 THEN
                    File.GetPathPart File: Files[0] RootPath=> RootPath Directory=> Directory FileName=> FileName2 FileNameWithoutExtension=> FileNameNoExtension Extension=> FileExtension
                    Variables.AddItemToList Item: Files List: DownloadList
                    File.RenameFiles.Rename Files: Files[0] NewName: $'''%FileNameNoExtension%_%CurrentDatabase%''' KeepExtension: True IfFileExists: File.IfExists.Overwrite RenamedFiles=> RenamedFiles
                ELSE
                    WAIT 20
                END
            END
            **ENDREGION
        END
        WebAutomation.GoToWebPage.GoToWebPage BrowserInstance: Browser Url: $'''https://www30.pointclickcare.com/home/logout.jsp''' WaitForPageToLoadTimeout: 60
    END
    DISABLE WebAutomation.CloseWebBrowser BrowserInstance: Browser
END FUNCTION

    SET FacNameTD TO $'''<td style=\"border:1px solid #e0e0e0;padding:6px 10px;text-align:left;background-color:#ffe5e5;color:#a33;font-weight:bold;\">%nameFacility%</td>'''
ELSE
    SET GTComp TO $'''<td style=\"%styleStandardTD%\">%ExcelDataBMHCC[TextAsNumber3][15]%</td>'''
    Variables.AddItemToList Item: nameFacility List: ListFacPerfect
    SET FacNameTD TO $'''<td style=\"%styleTDLeftMost%\">%nameFacility%</td>'''
END
DISABLE SET AttentionCheck TO $'''%D1Comp%
%D2Comp%
%D3Comp%
%D4Comp%
%D5Comp%
%D6Comp%
%D7Comp%
%GTComp%'''
File.WriteText File: $'''C:\\Users\\%User%\\OneDrive - Infinity HCM\\Automation\\POC Compliance\\Email Body - %nameState%.txt''' TextToWrite: $'''<tr style=\"%styleRowColor%\">
%FacNameTD%
%D1Comp%
%D2Comp%
%D3Comp%
%D4Comp%
%D5Comp%
%D6Comp%
%D7Comp%
%GTComp%
</tr>''' AppendNewLine: True IfFileExists: File.IfFileExists.Append Encoding: File.FileEncoding.Unicode
